query:
SELECT p.batch_no, se.id AS station_event_id, se.station_code, se.operator_user_id, se.business_date, se.count_for_productivity, psd.id AS productivity_detail_id, psd.user_id AS detail_user_id, psd.business_date AS detail_business_date, psd.points_awarded
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN station_events se ON se.product_id = p.id AND se.event_type = 'complete'
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.station_event_id = se.id
WHERE p.batch_no IN ('500025007','500025004','500024968','500025035','500025029')
ORDER BY p.batch_no, se.station_code, se.id;
